hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npm run build --silent 2>&1 | tail -3; exit $?

CMD="$TOOL_INPUT"; case "$CMD" in *'rm -rf'*|*'git push --force'*|*'git push -f'*|*'git reset --hard'*|*'git clean -fd'*|*'DROP TABLE'*|*'npx vercel --prod'*) echo "DENY: Comando pericoloso bloccato: $CMD" >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0

FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_PATH"; case "$FILE" in */CircuitSolver.js|*/AVRBridge.js|*/avrWorker.js|*/SimulationManager.js|*/pinComponentMap.js|*/orchestrator.py) echo 'DENY: File protetto — core engine + orchestrator. Solo Andrea puo modificarlo.' >&2; exit 2;; */package.json) echo 'ASK: Modifica a package.json — verificare che non aggiunga dipendenze non necessarie.' >&2; exit 0;; *.env*|*credentials*|*secret*) echo 'DENY: File sensibile bloccato.' >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0

cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/automa/context/ELAB-COMPLETE-CONTEXT.md" 2>/dev/null; cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/automa/context/CYCLE-HANDOFF.md" 2>/dev/null; echo '---'; echo 'CONTESTO RE-INIETTATO DOPO COMPACTION'
